name: Operative Alpha
description: A field agent with a knack for systems.

name: Asset Beta
description: A local contact; fragile but insightful.

name: Courier Gamma
description: Dead drops and burned phones—gets packages where they need to go.

name: Analyst Theta
description: Patterns in noise; spreadsheets where others see chaos.

name: Muscle Kappa
description: When the plan needs someone to stand in the doorway.

name: Ghost Delta
description: Insertion specialist; quiet footprints, loud results.

name: Brass Liaison
description: Knows which desks need a smile and which need a folder.

name: Wire Jockey
description: Builds bridges—digital ones—and burns them when paid.

name: Mirror Guard
description: Personal protection with a talent for reading exits.
